data.narrative:
Kreios Space is a seed-stage Space & Aerospace company that has raised €8M to date. The comparable universe spans 25 same-sector peers, including five public companies (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and eight private firms. Top private comparables include SpaceX, Rocket Lab, Blue Origin, Sierra Space, and Planet Labs.

Standard peer-median triangulation is not applicable due to an insufficient narrow peer set. While 25 same-sector peers exist, filtering for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier companies yielded fewer than the three datapoints required for statistical reliability. Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales multiples is also unavailable; the Space & Aerospace sector median P/S across six public tickers is 42.9x, but Kreios Space's revenue is not disclosed, as is typical for private companies at this stage.

Given the absence of usable triangulation methods, a defensible valuation cannot be derived from the data provided. Any range would require either disclosure of Kreios Space's revenue or identification of seed-stage Space & Aerospace transactions with known valuations and deal terms. The primary uncertainty is the lack of comparable transaction precedent at the seed stage in this capital-intensive, long-development-cycle sector. Further information on funding terms, burn rate, or technical milestones would be required to anchor a valuation estimate.
